title: Tender Thai Tagliatelle Tom Kha
description: A floral and tender weeknight Thai dish featuring tagliatelle, Tom Kha style, served in a mason jar, perfect for a quick and delicious meal. This recipe is shojin-friendly and can be prepared in under an hour.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the tagliatelle according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large pan, heat some oil over medium heat and saute the lemongrass, galangal, and kaffir lime leaves until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms and tofu to the pan and cook until the mushrooms are tender.
Pour in the coconut milk and vegetable broth, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked tagliatelle to the pan and toss to coat with the sauce.
Season with lime juice and chili flakes to taste.
Divide the mixture among four mason jars.
Garnish with additional kaffir lime leaves and lemongrass if desired.
